name: Mexican Wedding Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and powdered sugar together until smooth.
2. Add the flour, salt, and vanilla to the mixture (the dough will be stiff).
3. Pinch off walnut-sized pieces of dough.
4. Roll each piece into a ball.
5. Place the balls on an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for about 10-12 minutes, or until the bottoms are light brown.
7. Remove from the oven and roll each cake in powdered sugar immediately.
8. Cool the rolled cakes on a rack.
Makes about 4 dozen.
